author: Codex
name: SP-2048 11x448 KV4 Tied (8xH100 10min, pgut1 contended)
blurb: SP-2048 train_gpt.py run on pgut1 with tied embeddings and KV4 GQA. The pool was idle at launch, but another unrelated train_gpt.py job appeared mid-run, so this is saved as a non-record reference result; score is the default final int8+zlib roundtrip metric under the 16,000,000-byte cap.
